intro_cards.title: Casual Prohibition: じゃいけない
intro_cards.body:
じゃいけない is a casual form of prohibition — 'must not' / 'that's no good.'

• 嘘をついちゃじゃいけない。(You mustn't lie.)
• そんなことしちゃじゃいけないよ。(You can't do that!)

Formality ladder for prohibition:
• てはいけません (polite)
• てはいけない (plain)
• じゃいけない (casual)
• ちゃいけない (most casual)

じゃいけない is used in informal settings between friends and family. Not appropriate in formal situations.
